codeReview.summary: The fix is narrowly scoped and correctly addresses the regression: codegen now recognizes constructor-returned Self values as the concrete receiver type and preserves method return values when introducing a temporary for non-addressable pointer-receiver calls. The updated regression test now exercises a true rvalue receiver and verifies runtime behavior.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, compiler-worker skill, and commit 5b1bdd729fcc7c435b79e2fd57ac0ea0134c43c1. The implementation matches the requested Phase 7 pointer-receiver temporary-binding regression scope, and I found no high-confidence actionable bugs or shared-state gaps.
